overview: PhD student in Mathematics at Queen Mary University of London working on the theoretical aspects of inverse problems, machine learning, and mathematical imaging.
Previous research background in medical image computing, super-resolution, motion correction, generative models, and high-dimensional imaging datasets.
Industry experience in computer vision, remote inference, object detection, tracking, classification, cloud deployment, and data science.

education.title: PhD Mathematics
education.summary: Doctoral research in mathematics with a focus on inverse problems, machine learning, and imaging.

education.title: MPhil Machine Learning and Medical Image Computing
education.summary: Research degree in machine learning and medical image computing, including work on unsupervised super-resolution for anisotropic 3D medical imaging.

education.title: MSc Data Science and Analytics
education.summary: Specialised in statistics and machine learning.

education.title: BSc (Hons) Computer Science and Mathematics
education.summary: Undergraduate study spanning computer science, mathematics, programming, and applied machine learning.

experience.title: MPhil Research Student
experience.summary: Developed image reconstruction, super-resolution, and motion correction algorithms using deep learning for high-dimensional imaging datasets.
highlights: Worked across 2D and 3D computer vision, unsupervised learning, generative models, image reconstruction, and super-resolution.
Built research software for medical imaging experiments and reconstruction pipelines.

experience.title: Machine Learning Research Engineer, Contractor
experience.summary: Researched and prototyped computer vision tools for resource-limited devices.
highlights: Developed object detection, motion tracking, classification, and remote inference tools using deep learning.
Advised engineers and prototyped current machine learning approaches for applied computer vision systems.

experience.title: Machine Learning Research Engineer
experience.summary: Developed image analysis, classification, and inference tools using deep learning.
highlights: Built Python tools and embedded them into C++ systems using OpenCV and CUDA.
Developed audio-onset detection for latency analysis as part of a Google Stadia project.
Deployed neural network architectures on Google Cloud Platform and developed APIs for platform-agnostic inference over raw audio buffer data.
Implemented object detection, tracking, and classification algorithms for real-time audiovisual data streams.

experience.title: Data Scientist
experience.summary: Core researcher and developer for the Tortoise Global AI Index in 2021.
highlights: Researched, collected, and analysed large datasets using machine learning, web scraping, and APIs.
Performed statistical analysis and ranking of public company reports, patents, and global research output datasets.

experience.title: Software Development Intern
experience.summary: Worked on internal software development tools in Python, C, and LISP.
highlights: Developed an in-house compilation optimiser using a topological graph traversal algorithm to enable concurrent compilation and speed up regression testing.
Built a system for dynamically generating images of 3D models from region-of-interest data.
